Completed the policy-safe local SVG review/replay loop. Milestone 1 local SVG epic acceptance is complete: validated semantic plan, versioned local rig, deterministic renderer-neutral script, self-contained file:// player, restrained 320px-reviewed vocabulary, durable checksummed run artifacts, comparable reviewed replays, persistent AI-delegate disclosure, and exact neutral reset. All repository checks and required local demos pass.
